시편 1:1.content: Blessed is the man who doesn’t walk in the counsel of the wicked, nor stand on the path of sinners, nor sit in the seat of scoffers;

시편 1:2.content: but his delight is in Yahweh’s law. On his law he meditates day and night.

시편 1:3.content: He will be like a tree planted by the streams of water, that produces its fruit in its season, whose leaf also does not wither. Whatever he does shall prosper.

시편 1:4.content: The wicked are not so, but are like the chaff which the wind drives away.

시편 1:5.content: Therefore the wicked shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.

시편 1:6.content: For Yahweh knows the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked shall perish.
